_about: Canonical shared rule set for prose-lint. The rule CONTENT lives here (data); the lint HARNESS reads it (backend/app/services/prose_lint.py in this app; scripts/prose-lint.py in federal-proposal-assistant and federal-proposal-copilot, which pull this file via their sync scripts). A rule added here propagates to every consumer with no per-app code edit. Keep the term lists in spirit-sync with knowledge/doctrine/prohibited-claims-doctrine.md and PROSE-QUALITY-DOCTRINE.md.
_severity_policy: term_lists.process_terms and patterns.em_dash and the section-sign glyph are HIGH. Everything else is ADVISORY. (How each consumer maps HIGH/ADVISORY to blocking is the consumer's policy: the FPA/copilot CLI gate exits 1 on HIGH; this app emits high/medium ReviewFindings.)

meta_commentary: a capability we do not hold
